---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Elemental Siege
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or scenario this feature would address. Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include details on gameplay mechanics, UI, or technical implementation if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## World / Level Affected

If applicable, specify which world, level, or game area this feature relates to.

- [ ] Global (affects entire game)
- [ ] Specific world/level: _________________
- [ ] UI / Menus
- [ ] Audio
- [ ] Networking / Multiplayer
- [ ] Other: _________________

## Priority Suggestion

- [ ] **High** — Core gameplay, blocking other features
- [ ] **Medium** — Important but not blocking
- [ ] **Low** — Nice to have, quality-of-life improvement

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, references, or additional context here.
